---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What user need or pain point does this address? Who is the user?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see. UI sketches and rough behaviour are welcome.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why they aren't ideal.

## Scope
- [ ] Frontend change
- [ ] Database / schema change (will require a new migration + RLS policy)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / release workflow

## Out of scope
Anything you specifically do *not* want this issue to include.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, related issues, prior art.
